document_info.document_type: Building and Personal Property Coverage Form

business_description.nature_of_business: Commercial real estate investment and property management — office, retail, and mixed-use properties across the Dallas-Fort Worth and Houston metropolitan areas

coverages_discussed.notes: Policy premium 403697.14; coinsurance 90%; deductible 50000; form CP 00 10 10 12.
Endorsement CP 04 05 10 12 effective 2026-03-15. Covers loss in value of the undamaged portion of the building due to enforcement of ordinance or law requiring demolition.

Endorsement CP 04 09 10 12 effective 2026-03-15. Covers direct physical loss or damage caused by an equipment breakdown accident to a scheduled object, including mechanical, electrical, or pressure equipment.

Endorsement CP 04 17 10 12 effective 2026-03-15. Covers direct physical loss or damage caused by interruption of utility services including water supply, communication supply, and power supply services.

positives: Commercial real estate portfolio focused on office, retail, and mixed-use properties in major Texas metropolitan areas.
Property program includes building, contents, and business income coverage with substantial limits.
Endorsements include ordinance or law, equipment breakdown, and utility services direct damage coverage.
concerns: Vacancy over 60 consecutive days triggers exclusions for certain causes of loss and a 15% reduction for others.
Premium is subject to final audit after policy expiration.

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Commercial real estate investment and property management — office, retail, and mixed-use properties across the Dallas-Fort Worth and Houston metropolitan areas
